skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: How many tablespoons are equivalent to 22 teaspoons? (3 teaspoons = 1 tablespoon)
rationale: The correct answer is 22/3. Since 3 teaspoons = 1 tablespoon, 22 teaspoons equals 22 · (1/3) = 22/3 tablespoons (approximately 7.333). Equivalent forms include 22/3, 7.333, and 7.334.
